ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., property manager, agent, tenant) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the user */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental application */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the application is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the application */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "application_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the application */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the application was approved */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejecting the application (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the image is associated with */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., living room, kitchen, bedroom) */,
  "image_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the images should be displayed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the property */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date and time the property was viewed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to view the property (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's browsing session */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to view the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
